title: Fig 24
caption: partial vs normal sorting comparison.
simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
interpretation: Sorting stalls partial: no light monolayer forms and clusters trap inclusions, markedly slower than normal sorting (Figs 22-24).
